title_tesim: Myra's Office - First SCWU Mailing Address
caption_tesim: Myra moved from her office in January, 1981.Not only was this office the SCWU mailing address and phone number for a long time, it was also the place where the original Steering Committee meetings were held.More: it was where many of the founders of SCWU first got their shit together - first heard of a lesbian community - first found a way to join it. And ever since, many of our most committed members come by way of Myra's conviction that we do more for each other than any other resource can possibly provide.

title_tesim: First Documents Article for 10th Anniversary Newsletter
description_tesim: Details the origins of SCWU as a "support group" of the Whitman-Radclyffe Foundation (WRF). MacCulloch briefly outlines SCWU's initial challenges and learning process of working together, by-law and policy-making, official severance from WRF, estrangement from original members Terry DeCrescenzo and Betty Berzon, and the resignation/firing of June Mazer as newsletter co-editor.
